profile.name: Vivek Kumar
profile.headline: AI and ML Engineer | Intern IT Recruiter
profile.location: Law Gate, LPU, Phagwara, Punjab 144411, India

objective: To secure a challenging role as a Full Stack Developer in a reputed organization where I can utilize my skills in Python, React.js, cloud computing (AWS and Google Cloud), and machine learning frameworks like TensorFlow and OpenCV, contribute to impactful projects such as real-time applications and predictive systems, and grow as a professional while achieving organizational goals.

education.degree: Bachelor of Technology - BTech, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning

experience.title: Talent Acquisition Coordinator
experience.description: Working in IT recruiting and talent acquisition using AI-powered recruitment tools.

projects.title: Melbourne Property Price Predictor
projects.description: Developed a Real-Time Property Price Predictor for Melbourne City.
projects.impact: Enables instant property price estimation with an accessible, interactive interface.

projects.title: Real-Time Face Recognition Attendance System
projects.description: Created a real-time face detection system that captures live video from a webcam and identifies faces instantly using computer vision. Encoded known faces using NumPy arrays, compared encodings to mark attendance, and built a script to register new faces dynamically.
key_learnings: Distance thresholds for false positive prevention
projects.impact: Automates attendance tracking with accurate, real-time face recognition and dynamic user addition.

projects.title: Wi-Fi Controlled LEDs with ESP32
projects.description: Built two IoT projects using ESP32 — a simple Wi-Fi controlled single LED and an advanced multi-LED system with custom blink intervals, both controlled via a web interface in real time.

projects.title: B.Tech CSE AI/ML Curriculum Webpage
projects.description: Dynamic webpage for the B.Tech CSE AI and ML curriculum with interactive subject details, responsive design, and CSS animations.

projects.title: 1986 Argentina World Cup Football Team Card Display
projects.description: Dynamic football team card display using advanced JavaScript — DOM manipulation, object destructuring, ES6+ features like map() and Object.freeze(), and position-based filtering.

projects.title: E-Waste Management Web Platform
projects.description: Web platform for e-waste awareness using semantic HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript interactivity to educate users on responsible recycling.

projects.title: Calorie Counter
projects.description: Interactive calorie counter with form validation, dynamic UI updates. Learned regular expressions, template literals, and addEventListener().

projects.title: Role Playing Game
projects.description: Browser-based RPG with Store, Cave, and Fight Dragon actions, XP/Health/Gold bars. Covered arrays, objects, functions, loops, and conditionals in JavaScript.

projects.title: Data Formatter
projects.description: Project focused on data objects and SVG graphics, including the svg element, path, and d attributes.

projects.title: CSS Keyframes Animation Experiments
projects.description: Explored CSS keyframes — @keyframes rule, animation-fill-mode, from/to keywords, fading/sliding/bouncing effects combined with JavaScript.

projects.title: CipherSchools Cybersecurity Capstone Project
projects.description: Capstone project demonstrating real-world cybersecurity solutions — secure coding, networking modules, threat vector simulation, and defense mechanisms.
